requiredProperties.name: 母任務
requiredProperties.target: same project-local total-control task data source
requiredProperties.purpose: Points from a child task to the parent task it supports.

requiredProperties.name: 子任務
requiredProperties.target: same project-local total-control task data source
requiredProperties.purpose: Reciprocal relation showing child tasks that gate or support the parent task.

completionRule.parentTask: A parent task should not close until child tasks are complete, cancelled, transferred, or explicitly marked no longer needed.
completionRule.evidence: Closure must be grounded in task body evidence, source conversations, files, meetings, reports, or controller confirmation.
